results.text: Major 2026 tech news features massive AI investment , with firms like Alphabet and Amazon increasing capital spending, causing investor scrutiny. While Big Tech faces market fluctuations, Nvidia rose on AI demand. Key trends include AI-powered "pets" in China, regulatory challenges for TikTok, and commercial space advancements. AI Infrastructure Spending: Big Tech is splurging over $ 600 $ 600 $ 6 0 0 billion on AI in 2026, creating investor concern over profitability despite AI's growth. Alphabet and Amazon are leading, with Alphabet potentially doubling capital spending. Market Performance: Despite a tech rout, Nvidia rose 7%, Microsoft gained 1%, and Tesla was up 4%. AI Regulations & Security: TikTok faces charges regarding EU content rules and addictive features, while research shows 40% of employee AI use involves sensitive corporate data. Emerging Technology: The first commercial orbital space station is scheduled for launch in May 2026. Researchers are using terahertz microscopes to study electron motion. Consumer Tech: Motorola's thin Edge 70 and Vivo X300 are receiving attention for performance and camera capabilities. This video provides a summary of the current state of technology earnings and the market's reaction: 1m Bloomberg Podcasts YouTube • Feb 5, 2026
